description.zh-Hans: 分析输入图像并提取N种主要颜色。输出量化图像（每个像素映射到最近的调色板颜色）以及一个1行N列的调色板条带。
description.en: Analyzes an input image and extracts the N most dominant colors. Outputs the quantized image (each pixel mapped to the nearest palette color) and a 1-row x N-column palette strip.

triggers.zh-Hans: 颜色提取, 提取颜色, 主色调分析, 调色板生成
triggers.en: color extraction, extract colors, dominant colors, palette generation

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 从输入图像中提取8种主要颜色生成调色板。
exampleUsage.en: Extract 8 dominant colors from an input image to generate a palette.
